description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade is defined by tall, narrow windows and a recessed entryway flanked by two small trees, adding a touch of greenery. The structure appears to be divided into multiple rooms, with large window panels on the sides and a spacious patio or driveway area extending from the main building. The rear of the house is more solid, with minimal window openings and a simple, unadorned wall. The exterior is predominantly a light, neutral color, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall layout suggests a single-family residence with an emphasis on open, airy spaces and outdoor integration.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with tall windows, a recessed entry, and a spacious patio area, finished in a light color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, tall windows, and two small trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical window strips and the extended patio or driveway area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more vertical windows and a clear view of the open patio structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a mostly solid wall with minimal windows and landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with tall door, flanked by two small trees, and minimal decorative elements.
